code:
mut c3 = 0
mut c5 = 0
mut i = 1
while i <= 15
  c3 = c3 + 1
  c5 = c5 + 1
  let f3 = c3 == 3
  let f5 = c5 == 5
  if f3 and f5
    println("FizzBuzz")
    c3 = 0
    c5 = 0
  else if f3
    println("Fizz")
    c3 = 0
  else if f5
    println("Buzz")
    c5 = 0
  else
    println("#{i}")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
